description: Ara operon from Abasy Atlas: AraC/CRP regulons, transport (araE), genes (araB, araA, araD, araC), and L-arabinose pathway (Ribulose, R5P, X5P).
name: Ara Operon (Abasy-sourced)
notes: V6 = Abasy only. AraC and CRP regulons; araE, araBAD, araC; pathway from meta-curated network.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ARAB[L-Arabinose]
    ARAE[araE]
    ARAC[AraC regulon]
    CRP[CRP regulon]
    ARA_B[araB]
    ARA_A[araA]
    ARA_D[araD]
    ARAC2[araC]
    RIB[L-Ribulose]
    R5P[Ribulose-5-P]
    X5P[Xylulose-5-P]
    ARAB -->|transport| ARAE
    ARAB -->|inducer| ARAC
    ARAC -->|repression/activation| ARA_B
    ARAC -->|repression/activation| ARA_A
    ARAC -->|repression/activation| ARA_D
    ARAC -->|activation| ARAC2
    CRP -->|activation| ARA_B
    CRP -->|activation| ARA_A
    CRP -->|activation| ARA_D
    ARA_A -->|isomerase| RIB
    ARAB --> RIB
    ARA_B -->|kinase| R5P
    RIB --> R5P
    ARA_D -->|epimerase| X5P
    R5P --> X5P
    style ARAB fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style ARAE fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARAC fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style CRP fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style ARA_B fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_A fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_D fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARAC2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RIB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style R5P fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style X5P fill:#b197fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From Abasy Atlas v2.2 E. coli regulatory network; ara regulon, araE, pathway.

sources.title: Abasy Atlas
sources.note: Meta-curated bacterial regulatory networks; ara system.
